description_long: This is a cylindrical bolster pillow with a white base color, adorned with a bold geometric pattern in black and muted gold. The central motif features two large, crossed arrows, flanked by triangular and chevron designs that wrap around the circumference. The ends of the pillow are rounded and display a continuation of the geometric pattern, creating a visually cohesive look. The surface appears to be made of a soft fabric, likely cotton or polyester, with a smooth, matte finish. The pillow is likely filled with a lightweight, compressible material such as polyester fiberfill, giving it a plush and squeezable feel. There are no visible tags, labels, or brand logos on the exterior.
description: A cylindrical white bolster pillow with black and gold geometric arrow patterns, featuring a soft fabric surface and rounded ends.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full crossed arrow motif and geometric patterns clearly on the main surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the rounded end and a partial glimpse of the geometric pattern wrapping around the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the crossed arrows and geometric designs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the rounded end and edge pattern.
attribute_pattern: geometric with crossed arrows and chevrons
